n: Instance: The Fiddle and the Drum

steps.t: Ellen Fremedon can be found outside the Mead Hall of Underharrow. You have arrived in Underharrow and should acquaint yourself with Ellen Fremedon and…
Ellen Fremedon can be found near the river Snowbourn in Underharrow. You have finished speaking to Ellen Fremedon and met her daughter. You should now…
